Changelog

Upcoming deprecations can be found on the deprecations page.

July, 2026
Jul 8
Update

Reduced GPT-5.5 batch pricing by 20 percent.

Jul 6
Feature

Released GPT-Realtime-2.1, an updated realtime reasoning model with improved alphanumeric recognition.

June, 2026
Jun 24
Update

Updated the chat-latest snapshot, which points to the latest Instant model currently used in ChatGPT.

Jun 23
Feature

Released the Safety Usage Dashboard on the OpenAI API platform.

OpenAI
